name: Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. 8.25% Series D Cumulative Preferred Stock  par value $0.01 per share
summary: Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. 8.25% Series D Cumulative Preferred Stock par value $0.01 per share represents a class of preferred stock issued by Braemar Hotels & Resorts, a REIT. It pays a fixed dividend of 8.25% and is cumulative, meaning unpaid dividends accrue. The company invests in luxury hotels and resorts.
